ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Kothari Petrochemicals Limited filed a routine compliance certificate under SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. Their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, Cameo Corporate Services, confirmed that all securities received for dematerialization were processed, physical certificates mutilated/cancelled, and the Register of Members updated within the stipulated 15 days. This indicates sound corporate governance and adherence to regulatory requirements regarding share transfer and dematerialization processes, with no apparent red flags or material negative impacts.
